gigPicker.label: Gig
gigPicker.empty: No gigs yet - create one first

detail.heading: Invoice {{number}}
detail.finalizedNotice: This invoice is finalized. Voiding and re-issuing is required to make corrections.

voidDialog.title: Void invoice {{number}}?
voidDialog.intro: Voiding this invoice has the following consequences:
voidDialog.permanent: The invoice can no longer be edited, sent or paid — voiding is permanent.
voidDialog.ledgerReversal: A reversing entry is posted to the ledger, undoing the recorded revenue and receivable.
voidDialog.paymentLinkRemoved: The Mollie payment link is removed; the customer can no longer pay through it. If it turns out to have been paid already, the invoice is marked paid instead of voided.
voidDialog.correction: To correct a mistake, void this invoice and create a new one.

emailDialog.title: Edit the personal message
emailDialog.helperText: This is the personal accompanying text in the email message.

newDialog.title: New invoice
newDialog.description: Pick a gig to draft the invoice from. The band fee, venue address, and a default line description will be filled in.
newDialog.billingTargetDescription: This gig has both a festival and a venue. Choose which organisation to bill.

errors.mollieKeyMissing: Mollie API key not configured. Go to Settings → Integrations.
errors.zeroAmount: Invoice total must be greater than zero.
errors.voidInvoice: Cannot create a payment link for a void invoice.
errors.alreadyPaid: This payment link has already been paid — the invoice is now marked paid.
errors.removeFailed: Mollie could not remove the link. Try again later.

pdf.retry: PDF render failed - click to retry

validation.lineRequired: At least one line with a description is required
